name: Deep-Dish Pear Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 400°F.
2. Peel pears and cut into bite-size pieces. Set aside.
3. In a large bowl, combine remaining filling ingredients and fold in pears.
4. Pour pear mixture into pie crust and bake at 400°F for 15 minutes.
5. Lower heat to 350°F and continue baking for 25 more minutes.
6. Mix together topping ingredients.
7. Remove pie from oven and sprinkle topping over filling.
8. Raise heat to 375°F and bake until topping is brown.
